name: MarketplaceEscrowController

ironRules.rule: LIFO compensation order MUST be [REFUND_PAYMENT, RESTORE_INVENTORY]. FIFO order leaves buyer money captured while inventory is released, enabling oversell. REFUND must complete before RESTORE.
Dispute path MUST use updateDocument(status:DISPUTED, accessBlocked:true) ONLY — NEVER deleteDocument on any escrow record. Deletion destroys forensic evidence for chargeback defence.
escrow_auto_release_days MUST come from FREEDOM config — not hardcoded. Hardcoded release window prevents operator adjustment.
Dispute handler MUST NOT trigger compensation saga — compensation is reserved for PaymentReversalRequested only. Triggering LIFO on dispute causes premature refund before dispute resolution.
DNA-8: storeDocument(escrow release record) MUST occur BEFORE enqueue(EscrowReleased). T612 depends on escrow record existence.

keywords: MarketplaceEscrowController T611 LIFO REFUND_PAYMENT RESTORE_INVENTORY dispute updateDocument deleteDocument prohibited escrow_auto_release_days FREEDOM EscrowReleased EscrowDisputed PaymentReversalRequested FLOW-16
